memberdef.name: m_time_stepper_builder

memberdef.definition: BslAdvection1D< GridInterest, IdxRangeAdvection, IdxRangeFunction, FunctionBuilder, FunctionEvaluator, AdvectionFieldBuilder, AdvectionFieldEvaluator, TimeStepperBuilder >::BslAdvection1D
memberdef.argsstring: (FunctionBuilder const &function_builder, FunctionEvaluator const &function_evaluator, AdvectionFieldBuilder const &adv_field_builder, AdvectionFieldEvaluator const &adv_field_evaluator, TimeStepperBuilder const &time_stepper_builder)
memberdef.name: BslAdvection1D

briefdescription.para: Constructor when the advection domain and the function domain are different.

detaileddescription.para: When IdxRangeAdvection and IdxRangeFunction are different, we need one builder and evaluator for each index range.
We can also use it when we want two different builders/evaluators but defined on the same domain (e.g. different boundary conditions for the evaluators).

parameterdescription.para: Builder along the GridInterest direction used to build the interpolation representation of the advected function (allfdistribu) on the domain of the function.
Evaluator along the GridInterest direction used to evaluate the advected function at the characteristic feet.
Builder along the GridInterest direction to build a spline representation of the advection field on the function domain.
Evaluator along the GridInterest direction to evaluate the advection field spline representation on the function domain.
A builder for the time integration method used for the characteristic equation.

memberdef.definition: BslAdvection1D< GridInterest, IdxRangeAdvection, IdxRangeFunction, FunctionBuilder, FunctionEvaluator, AdvectionFieldBuilder, AdvectionFieldEvaluator, TimeStepperBuilder >::~BslAdvection1D
memberdef.name: ~BslAdvection1D

memberdef.definition: FunctionField BslAdvection1D< GridInterest, IdxRangeAdvection, IdxRangeFunction, FunctionBuilder, FunctionEvaluator, AdvectionFieldBuilder, AdvectionFieldEvaluator, TimeStepperBuilder >::operator()
memberdef.argsstring: (FunctionField const allfdistribu, AdvecField const advection_field, double const dt, std::optional< AdvecFieldDerivConstField > const advection_field_derivatives_min=std::nullopt, std::optional< AdvecFieldDerivConstField > const advection_field_derivatives_max=std::nullopt) const
memberdef.name: operator()

briefdescription.para: Advects allfdistribu along the advection dimension GridInterest for a duration dt.

parameterdescription.para: Reference to the advected function, allocated on the device
Reference to the advection field, allocated on the device.
Reference to the advection field derivatives at the left side of the interest dimension, allocated on the device.
Reference to the advection field derivatives at the right side of the interest dimension, allocated on the device.

simplesect.para: A reference to the allfdistribu array after advection on dt.

briefdescription.para: A class which computes the advection along the dimension of interest GridInterest.

detaileddescription.para: This operator solves the following equation type

para.formula: $ \partial_t f_s(t,x) + A_{s, x_i} (x') \cdot \partial_{x_i} f_s (t, x) = 0, \qquad x\in \Omega, x'\in\Omega'$

listitem.para: $ f $, a function defined on an domain $ \Omega $;
$ A $, an advection field defined on subdomain $ \Omega'\subset \Omega $;

detaileddescription.para: The characteristic equation is solved on the advection domain $ \Omega'$. Then the feet on $ \Omega$ are computed from the characteristic feet on $ \Omega'$ and the function $ f $ is interpolated at the feet in $ \Omega $.
The characteristic equation is solved using a time integration method (ITimeStepper).

parameterdescription.para: The dimension along which the advection is computed. It refers to the dimension of $ x_i $ in the equation.

The index range for the interpolation points defined on $ \Omega' $ where the characteristic equation is solved. $ \Omega' $ also refers to the domain of the advection field. It had to also be defined on the GridInterest for the time integration method.
The index range of $ \Omega $ where allfdistribu is defined.
The type of the interpolation builder for the advected function along GridInterest.
The type of the interpolation evaluator for the advected function along GridInterest.
The type of the spline builder for the advection field (see SplineBuilder).
The type of the spline evaluator for the advection field (see SplineEvaluator).
A time stepper builder indicating which time integration method should be applied to solve the characteristic equation.
